creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 13.02.2014 07:45, Jin Guojun wrote:
> Moused is running because USB mouse works fine.

moused(8) is start automatically by devd(8) when a USB mouse is plugged
in. This is not the case for a PS/2 mouse: you have to specify
"moused_enable=YES" in your /etc/rc.conf.

-- 
Jean-Sébastien Pédron
